Q29 How many specialists have you talked to in the last 6 months?
FFS
MA-PD We want to know your rating of the specialist you talked to most often in the last 6 months. Using any number from 0 to
rate_spec MA-Only Q30 10, where 0 is the worst specialist possible and 10 is the best specialist possible, what number would you use to rate
FFS that specialist?
